name: giduru-workspace
description: Workspace for the @giduru/core and giduru-cli npm packages.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @giduru/core && npm run build --workspace giduru-cli
scripts.pack:dry-run: npm run pack:dry-run --workspace @giduru/core && npm run pack:dry-run --workspace giduru-cli
scripts.publish:check: npm run publish:check --workspace @giduru/core && npm run publish:check --workspace giduru-cli
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @giduru/core && npm run test --workspace giduru-cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @giduru/core && npm run typecheck --workspace giduru-cli
